'''hanak''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:older siblings|older siblings]]".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-n-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:older siblings|older siblings]]
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:hænikith|hænikith]] || [[word:hænikij|hænikij]] || [[word:hænikish|hænikish]] || [[word:hæniki|hæniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanunukuth|hanunukuth]] || [[word:hanunukuj|hanunukuj]] || [[word:hanunukush|hanunukush]] || [[word:hanunuku|hanunuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanukuth|hanukuth]] || [[word:hanukuj|hanukuj]] || [[word:hanukush|hanukush]] || [[word:hanuku|hanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanufkuth|hanufkuth]] || [[word:hanufkuj|hanufkuj]] || [[word:hanufkush|hanufkush]] || [[word:hanufkuf|hanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hæneketh|hæneketh]] || [[word:hænekej|hænekej]] || [[word:hænekesh|hænekesh]] || [[word:hæneke|hæneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hanonokoth|hanonokoth]] || [[word:hanonokoj|hanonokoj]] || [[word:hanonokosh|hanonokosh]] || [[word:hanonoko|hanonoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanokoth|hanokoth]] || [[word:hanokoj|hanokoj]] || [[word:hanokosh|hanokosh]] || [[word:hanoko|hanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanofkoth|hanofkoth]] || [[word:hanofkoj|hanofkoj]] || [[word:hanofkosh|hanofkosh]] || [[word:hanofkof|hanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[paucal]] || — || — || — || [[word:hanïfkïf|hanïfkïf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plentiful]] || — || — || — || [[word:hanïfnïfkïf|hanïfnïfkïf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:hænækæth|hænækæth]] || [[word:hænækæj|hænækæj]] || [[word:hænækæsh|hænækæsh]] || [[word:hænækæ|hænækæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:hananakath|hananakath]] || [[word:hananakaj|hananakaj]] || [[word:hananakash|hananakash]] || [[word:hananaka|hananaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:hanakath|hanakath]] || [[word:hanakaj|hanakaj]] || [[word:hanakash|hanakash]] || [[word:hanaka|hanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:hanafkath|hanafkath]] || [[word:hanafkaj|hanafkaj]] || [[word:hanafkash|hanafkash]] || [[word:hanafkaf|hanafkaf]]
|}

''50 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hanakatha|hanakatha]] || [[word:hanakaja|hanakaja]] || [[word:hanakasha|hanakasha]] || [[word:hanakaka|hanakaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hanakath|hanakath]] || [[word:hanakaj|hanakaj]] || [[word:hanakash|hanakash]] || [[word:hanaka|hanaka]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hanakathal|hanakathal]] || [[word:hanakajal|hanakajal]] || [[word:hanakashal|hanakashal]] || [[word:hanakakal|hanakakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hanakathatha|hanakathatha]] || [[word:hanakajaja|hanakajaja]] || [[word:hanakashasha|hanakashasha]] || [[word:hanakaka|hanakaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hanakathan|hanakathan]] || [[word:hanakajan|hanakajan]] || [[word:hanakashan|hanakashan]] || [[word:hanakakan|hanakakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hanakathaoro|hanakathaoro]] || [[word:hanakajaoro|hanakajaoro]] || [[word:hanakashaoro|hanakashaoro]] || [[word:hanakakaoro|hanakakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|c2e237e}}
